title: Warm up
content: The slide shows three driving scenes in Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, each with different environments and activities.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide introduces the theme of China's transformation through images of taxis and famous landmarks. It promises a journey understanding the dynamic shifts occurring within the nation.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide discusses investigating and researching cities based on local features, development strategies, and their outcomes. It suggests evaluating strategies in a structured manner.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide pairs cities with their development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide highlights development strategies through driving experiences, indicating each city's unique approach to growth. It emphasizes tailoring strategies to local features for effective city development.
